name: Ham Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 slices cooked ham, lowfat; thick slices
or- about three cups of leftover ham
1 can low fat Cream of Mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ham at the bottom of a crock pot.
2. Spread a layer of soup over the ham.
3. Arrange alternating layers of potatoes, onions, and cheese between groups of ham slices.
4. Continue layering until all ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
5. Cook on high for a short time to heat the pot through, then switch to low heat.
6. Cover and cook for six to eight hours, or until the casserole is heated through and the cheese is melted.
